\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Layered‑medium 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function (scalar/gradient/dyadic) + RWG integrals. 

This header declares a comprehensive Green\textquotesingle{}s function engine for {\bfseries{stratified media}} (stack of planar layers with piecewise‑constants $\epsilon_{r,i},\mu_{r,i}$). It supports\+:


\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Pointwise kernels\+: scalar $G\!,\;\nabla\textnormal{\textquotesingle}G\!,\;\overline{\overline G}$ with near‑singular {\bfseries{smoothed}} variants for robust area integration.
\item Assembly helpers\+: two‑triangle (D/K) and point–triangle (delta/kappa) integrals with singularity cancellation and optional {\bfseries{edge line integrals}} on interfaces.
\item {\bfseries{Tabulation + interpolation}} of Sommerfeld integrals on structured grids, with per‑interaction coefficient sets (intra‑layer, inter‑layer) to accelerate reuse.
\end{DoxyItemize}\hypertarget{GreenFLayered3D_8h_autotoc_md12}{}\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{Design notes}{Design notes}}\label{GreenFLayered3D_8h_autotoc_md12}

\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item A {\bfseries{\doxylink{classSommerfeldIntegrator}{Sommerfeld\+Integrator}}} is owned per interaction group; it evaluates smooth parts of layered Green\textquotesingle{}s terms in cylindrical spectral coordinates. Quasi‑static (QS) pieces are handled analytically (cancel singularities), while the radiative remainder is tabulated.
\item The {\ttfamily coeff\+Intra\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}/{\ttfamily coeff\+Inter} vectors hold precomputed interpolation weights to map (r,z) to the tabulation grid(s); {\ttfamily intra\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}\+Index}/{\ttfamily inter\+Indeces} bind triangles/layers to the right coefficient set.
\item {\ttfamily enable\+Line\+Integrals} toggles analytic edge terms used when triangles share an interface. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
